institution.name: Baitul Quran International Madrasha
institution.address: Stadium Road, Nandibari, Muktagacha Upazila, Mymensingh, Bangladesh
institution.curated_by: MJ Ahmad — Steward of Ethical Inheritance

homepage.title: 🕌 Baitul Quran International Madrasha
homepage.subtitle: Center for Quran Memorization and Ethical Stewardship

sections.heading: Welcome
sections.content: This is the central hub for students, teachers, and supervisors. Access dashboards, track Hifz progress, and engage with AI‑assisted memorization tools.

sections.heading: Departments
sections.content: Khatmi, Hifz (1–10, 1–20, 1–29), Nazara, and Nurani Maktab.

sections.heading: Features
sections.content: Attendance system, Hifz Tracker, Memorization Challenges, Countdown to Target, and AI‑assisted Quran memorization.
